name: number-slider
title: Number Slider
description: Compact labeled Slider convenience with a live numeric readout. Prefer Slider for dual thumb, marks, orientation, or richer value chrome.

api.description: Compact labeled Slider convenience with a live numeric readout. Composes Label and Slider. Prefer Slider for dual thumb, marks, orientation, or richer value chrome.

props.name: value
props.description: Current value (required). Values outside min to max are clamped for the readout and thumb.

props.name: step
props.description: Increment between values. Also drives display precision.

props.name: thickness
props.description: Track and thumb thickness. Passed through to Slider. sm is fine, md is default, lg is a thick rail.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual recipe. Passed through to Slider.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Composes Label and Slider. See those components for their own token groups.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for the gap between label, slider, and readout.
